Reminder: Not financial advice. Just my opinion and observation.

They say “he who laughs last, laughs best.” But wisdom is not in laughing at others.

I genuinely empathize with everyone, even those who criticize me.

Peace is the higher path.

It doesn’t really matter if I’m right or wrong.

What matters is the message, and that message has helped many avoid losses during the biggest liquidation event in crypto history.

This wasn’t a one-time call. I’ve stood by this view since May, through every wave of criticism,
“If you want to find the secrets of the cryptoverse, think in terms of liquidity, fuckery and manipulation.”
Get ready for impact.
